Jim, one of us welcome optimizing your ad budgets. Simply put, there's three reasons why you should be the person to optimize your ad budgets and not let someone else do it. The biggest reason for that is that it is your money and no one else's, which means that you're going to care about it more than anyone else will, which means that you're going to check it more frequently and you're going to care about it and you're going to underst- Well, okay? And the second piece to this is that you can follow a simple decision tree. What I mean by that is it's simply math and especially when it comes to running traffic and how much you make on average per, you can back that into how much you can pay per lead. So what I'm going to do is a funny story related to that. So there was a gym owner saying he was struggling to get leads and I was like, okay, let me hop on the phone and figure this out with you. So hop on the phone and we look into his ad, it's like, well, it doesn't look like you're not struggling to get lead turning your ads off at $10. He's like, well, who told you that? What arbitrary number in the sky did you grab out and say $10 to the amount that is necessary? It's ridiculous. And here are gyms who work with us, average $850 per average ticket. The best guys go $2,000 plus. But the average, get $850 upfront cash. Here's why that's important. So okay, 20% and you're getting $800 at this by $5, $25 per lead and you're still breaking even. It means your ability and you still have all the contract value. They're recurring EFT that continues to build up. So you mean that whether you get $10 leads, $30 leads, $50 leads shouldn't matter. What matters is how you monetize. What matters is how, because if you can do this well, then you can afford ads on any platform. All right? So the reason you should be the person who optimizes your ad schedule and limit it to date is incredibly high value and it should be you to do it because no one's going to care about your money like you will. So learn the skill, get good at it and remember that it just takes practice. The more ads you run, the better you get at, the faster you'll be able to do it and the faster you'll be able to see patterns and know this looks like a winner, this looks like a loser. You can scale up and scale down accordingly so that you can be the master of the fate.
